title: Block private-corpus refresh suggestions when no operator manifest exists

items.text: Private corpus refresh blocker: no operator-owned private production corpus manifest is checked in or available to this fixture.

locator.quote: no operator-owned private production corpus manifest

items.text: XY-930 owns private-corpus and credentialed production gates when operator inputs exist; fixture-only output must not claim a private-corpus refresh pass.

locator.quote: XY-930 owns private-corpus and credentialed production gates

timeline.summary: The private-corpus refresh suggestion remains blocked until operator-owned inputs exist.

prompt.content: Suggest a private-corpus refresh when private inputs exist.

must_not_include: private production corpus quality is proven

answer_correctness.criteria: The fixture records the private-corpus refresh as blocked.

evidence_grounding.criteria: The blocker points to the missing manifest and XY-930 boundary.

lifecycle_behavior.criteria: The blocked state remains typed and not hidden as pass.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact

acceptable_phrases: No operator-owned private production corpus manifest is available.

encoding.reason: No operator-owned private production corpus manifest is available; private-corpus refresh suggestions stay blocked under XY-930.

follow_up.title: XY-930 private-corpus input gate
follow_up.reason: Run private-corpus and credentialed production gates only when operator-owned inputs exist.
